Backend calls /link/token/create to get a link_token\n2. Frontend opens Plaid Link with that token\n3. User selects bank & logs in\n4. Plaid returns a public_token\n5. Backend exchanges it for an access_token\n6. Backend uses access_token to fetch transactions via /transactions/get' ); }} >
